products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Super Saiyan Son Goku Deluxe Version 64 cm
products.description: Prime 1 Studio and MegaHouse are proud to collaborate to make a long-awaited statue of the main protagonist Son Goku from Dragon Ball Z! We chose his popular Super Saiyan look in a dynamic Kamehameha Pose with an LED Light-up function which gives some vigor to the whole statue. We also added some small highly detailed parts to the base and the whole body that gives an amazing effect of a fierce battle. The Deluxe Version comes with a total of four portraits - Normal, Super Saiyan 1, Super Saiyan 2 and Super Saiyan 3. Some additional lighting effects are added while display with SSJ2 and SSJ3 portraits. Product Specifications: - Size approximately 64 x 48 x 47 cm - One (1) Set of Special Effect Parts for Display - One (1) designed theme base with LED Light-up function - LED Light-up function Kamehameha Charging Effect - Four (4) Portraits (Normal, Super Saiyan 1, Super Saiyan 2, Super Saiyan 3) - Lighting effect parts to display with SSJ2 and SSJ3 portraits Limited Edition. Please note: Due to the size of this item, additional shipping costs may apply. Apart from your location, the actual package size and weight is needed to determine those costs. Both are unknown at this point and may not be available until the product arrives in our warehouse.

products.name: Gravion Moderoid Plastic Model Kit God Gravion 17 cm
products.description:
"Fellows of the Gran Knights, combine in MODEROID form!"

From the anime series "Gravion" comes a plastic model of the fang that crushes evil, God Gravion!
The Gran Kaiser, G Shadow, G Driller, G Striker and G Attacker can be combined into God Gravion with the use of interchangeable parts. The core Gran Kaiser is fully articulated and even comes with the Gran Magnum as a bonus part! A non-transformable body part for displaying God Gravion in combined form is included in order to make the model easier to move and display. A Graviton Sword, two Graviton Rifles and interchangeable hand parts are all included. The various parts of the mecha have been separated into various colored runners and pre-painted parts, and the model kit also comes with stickers, making it easy to recreate the mecha from the series with a simple assembly.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Super Saiyan Vegeta 64 cm
products.description:
Prime 1 Studio is proud to present another collaboration with MegaHouse to bring you the long-awaited prince of the Saiyan Race, 1/4 Scale MPMDBZ-02 Super Saiyan Vegeta from Dragon Ball Z!!!

Vegeta is from Planet Vegeta, home of the elite warriors of the proud Saiyan race. He is the true eternal rival of Son Goku and only lives to become stronger and defeat his enemies. Regardless of whatever allies he may make on the way, Vegeta is a proud warrior that stays true to himself. Through the spirit of seeking power, dedicated training, and true determination, Vegeta is a Super Saiyan!

MegaHouse has collaborated with Prime 1 Studio's exquisite 3D modeling to bring to life one of the most iconic moments in DBZ history. We have captured Vegeta as he is charging his Big Bank Attack! Complete with LED illumination and swappable lightning and stone effects around the statue, this one-of-a-kind masterpiece will pop out in any collection. Pair with the MPMDBZ-02 Super Saiyan Goku to have the ultimate Saiyan display! A must have for DBZ fans everywhere!

Product Specifications:

- Statue Size approx. 25 inches tall with Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:39.6cm]
- Statue Size approx. without Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:48.7cm]
- LED Illumination effect on Base and Big Bang Attack
- One (1) Dragon Ball Z designed theme base
- One (1) Set of Special Effect Parts for Display around Base
- Two (2) Swappable effect parts (Lightning Effect, Stone Parts)

Ultraman Dyna Flash Type (15 cm)

Ultraman Shincchou Seihou

Bandai Tamashii Nations

products.description:
From the TV anime series "One Piece" comes this great and fully articulated action figure from Tamashii Nations S.H. Figuarts' series.

The figure is approx. 8 cm tall and comes with additional accessories in a window box.

products.name: Naruto S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Sasuke Uchiha -Ninja Prodigy of the Uchiha Clan Bloodline- 13 cm
products.description:
A young Naruto Uzumaki comes to S.H.Figuarts. Its incredible range of motion allows for poses truly fitting of the energetic ninja. The face has been scultped to look like a boy's, different from his usual older appearance!

Contents:

- Main unit
- 4 interchangeable faces
- Interchangeable hands: (4 left, 5 right)
- 1 pair of interchangeable hands
- Fuma Shuriken
- Kunai
- Fire Release effect
- Chidori
- Stand and support for Fire Release effect

products.name: Naruto Shippuden S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Naruto Uzumaki -The Jinchuuriki entrusted with Hope- 14 cm
products.description:

Set Contents: Main Body, Three left and four right optional hands, Four optional expressions, Kunai, "Rasengan" effect, Crossed arm parts

products.name: Naruto Shippuden S.H. Figuarts Accessories Ichiraku Ramen Set
products.description:
ICHIRAKU RAMEN SET NARUTO SHIPPUDEN SH FIGUARTS .

Tamashii Nations presents, as part of the S.H. Figuarts collection, the Ichiraku Ramen set. It measures 22 cm and is based on his appearance in the anime 'Naruto: Shippuden'. Contains 10x empty bowls, 2x ramen bowls, 1x tray, 1x pot with chopsticks, 6x empty cups, 2x cups with drink, 2x face plates, 4x pairs of hands with chopsticks, 4x extra pairs of hands and 2x hands holding chopsticks with food.

products.name: Naruto Shippuden S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Sakura Haruno -Inheritor of Tsunade's indominable will- 14 cm
products.description:
Sakura Haruno, as seen in "NARUTO: Shippuden," rejoins S.H.Figuarts with all new joint technology.

products.description: This detailed action figure from Tamashii Nations' "S.H.Figuarts" series comes with "My Hero Academia". It is approx. 14 cm tall and comes with accessories in a window box.

products.description: S.H.Figuarts gets even more dramatic! Captain America, as seen in his final form in the epic "Avengers: Endgame," joins the series! The accurately detailed and highly posable figure includes a shield, a shield strap, four optional pairs of hands, two optional heads, a broken shield, Mjolnir, and a Mjolnir effect part.

products.name: Ultraman S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Ultraman Suit Ace (The Animation) 15 cm
products.description:
ULTRAMAN SUIT ACE -the Animation-, as seen in the final season of the "ULTRAMAN" animated series now streaming on Netflix, joins S.H.Figuarts. Featuring proportions and articulation that capture his animated on-screen presence, it can take his signature poses with ease. The sculpting was overseen by Tsuburaya Productions' LSS division for exquisite accuracy. Designed to pose naturally, this is one figure fans won't want to miss.

Tamashii Digital Coloring accurately replicates his new costume, and the set even comes with a detachable hood and pair of removable sunglasses to replicate your favorite scenes! The glider features moving parts allowing you to replicate its appearance in different modes.

products.name: Tamashii Effect Action Figure Accessory Energy Aura Blue Version
products.description: The power-up effect piece that you’ve been waiting for is coming to TAMASHII EFFECT! Just like its name, this piece is full of energy and is perfect for recreating power-up or intense battles scenes of your favorite characters. The effect is compromised of three arrangeable pieces and is also available in yellow.

products.name: Dragonball Tamashii Buddies PVC Statue Frieza 9 cm
products.description: Created with style in mind, TAMASHII BUDDIES maintains the essence of a character at a compact, collectible size. The second edition to the Dragon Ball series includes the Emperor of Space, Frieza in his first form! Frieza comes with a unique, stackable display and matching background panel that is interchangeable. Stack all your Dragon Ball BUDDIES for a display with impact!

products.name: S.H. Figuarts Dragon Ball Z Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta
products.description: Manufacturer:BandaiCode:BTN63911-0Height:13cmCHOKING HAZARD:This product may contain small parts. It is not a toy and only suitable for the persons over 15 years old.   Attention:No guarantee on mint box.Description:Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta, as seen in "Dragon Ball GT", joins S.H.Figuarts using detailed sculpting and the latest articulation technology.Set Contents:Main Body, Three optional expression parts, Five pairs of optional hands, Final Shine Attack effect parts, Tail

products.name: Dragonball Z Figure-rise Standard Plastic Model Kit Super Saiyan Vegetto 15 cm
products.description:
Bandai is proud to present the new series of Plastic Model Kits. Each kit comes with nice accessories. Extra hands and faces along with power effects and even stands for the effects.

It stands 15 cm talll and comes in a window box packaging.
